source_title: Synaptic deficits in iPSC-derived cortical interneurons in schizophrenia are mediated by NLGN2 and rescued by N-acetylcysteine.
selection_rationale: Direct pre-cutoff rescue evidence in schizophrenia-derived cortical interneurons.

source_title: Cross-platform validation of neurotransmitter release impairments in schizophrenia patient-derived NRXN1-mutant neurons.
selection_rationale: Patient-derived schizophrenia neurons showed a pre-cutoff synaptic release impairment anchored to NRXN1.

source_title: Reelin Signaling and Synaptic Plasticity in Schizophrenia.
selection_rationale: Reelin remained a late pre-cutoff synaptic plasticity anchor before the rescue freeze boundary.

source_title: Transcriptional regulation of GAD1 GABA synthesis gene in the prefrontal cortex of subjects with schizophrenia.
selection_rationale: GAD1 captures the pre-cutoff inhibitory-synapse transcriptional deficit lane.

source_title: Downregulation of parvalbumin at cortical GABA synapses reduces network gamma oscillatory activity.
selection_rationale: PVALB preserves the pre-cutoff fast-spiking interneuron synapse signal in the frozen ranking set.
